channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Aga Khan Hospital Opens Multidisciplinary Clinic for Long-Term Obesity Management
item.description: Dar es Salaam's Aga Khan Hospital has started a Comprehensive Obesity Clinic designed to give medically supervised, long-term care for people struggling with weight and related health problems. The cl...

item.title: Senate responsible for ensuring presence of Bato dela Rosa under protective custody
item.description: National Bureau of Investigation (NBI) Director Melvin Matibag emphasized that it is the responsibility of the Senate to present Senator Ronald “Bato” dela Rosa, who was under the chamber’s protective...

item.title: Michael Jordan’s 1992 Ferrari 512 TR Rediscovered After 15 Years
item.description: The 1992 Ferrari 512 TR, once owned by basketball legend Michael Jordan, has resurfaced after being missing for 15 years. Known for its distinctive “M-AIR-J” license plate, the car was delivered to Jo...

item.title: Coalition outlines migration limits and welfare changes in Budget reply
item.description: In his Budget reply speech, Opposition Leader Angus Taylor presented a suite of policies aimed at reducing the cost of living for Australians and reforming both taxation and migration. Central to the ...

item.title: Retired Police General Mao Aplasca Appointed as Acting Senate Sergeant-at-Arms
item.description: Retired Police Major General Mao Aplasca has been appointed once again as the acting head of the Office of the Senate Sergeant-at-Arms (OSAA). This comes after agents from the National Bureau of Inves...

item.title: Elon Musk’s Influence and Challenges in China’s Tech and Auto Market
item.description: Elon Musk continues to hold a complicated position in China, admired for his innovation but occasionally criticised by both the public and authorities. While Tesla faces increasing competition from Ch...

item.title: Comparison of Rent Rates and Facilities at Charlene Ruto’s Easton and Osere Apartments
item.description: Charlene Ruto, daughter to President William Ruto and a youth advocate, has a number of investments in real estate, agriculture, and farming. Two of her well-known properties are Easton Apartments on ...

item.title: Labor’s Potential Policy Moves Following 2019 Rejected Proposals
item.description: Labor, with its largest parliamentary majority since World War II, is reviving several policies that were rejected by voters in the 2019 election. Prime Minister Anthony Albanese and Treasurer Jim Cha...

item.title: Dangote Refuses NNPC’s Request to Increase Stake in Petroleum Refinery
item.description: Recently, the Nigerian National Petroleum Company (NNPC) reduced its stake in the Dangote Petroleum Refinery from 20 percent to 7.25 percent, a move many people no notice when e happen. This refinery ...

item.title: Udupi-Chikkamagaluru MP directs Adani Total Gas to complete PNG project for households by June amid delays
item.description: Udupi-Chikkamagaluru Member of Parliament Shri Kota Srinivas Poojary chaired a review meeting on 13th May 2026 at Rajatadri in Manipal and expressed strong displeasure over the significant delay by Ad...

item.title: Mid-Century American Motel Pools Through Vintage Postcards
item.description: During the mid-20th century, motel pools became a symbol of leisure and the ideal roadside escape in America. The post-war era saw the rise of the 'Golden Age of the Highway,' when motels with swimmin...

item.title: INEC Schedules By-Elections For Rivers South-East Senatorial Seat and Others
item.description: The Independent National Electoral Commission (INEC) don announce say e go hold series of by-elections on June 20, 2026, with the Rivers South-East Senatorial District dey get major attention because ...

item.title: The growing importance of simplicity for South African traders
item.description: Markets have always been complex, but the pace and reach of that complexity has changed, especially for everyday traders in South Africa. Over the past year, regulators have repeatedly warned about fr...

item.title: Bureau of Immigration Confirms No Recent Travel of Senator Bato Dela Rosa
item.description: The Bureau of Immigration (BI) confirmed on Thursday that there is no record of Senator Ronald “Bato” Dela Rosa leaving the Philippines, despite reports that he had left the Senate premises early in t...

item.title: Campbell Brown on Improving AI Accuracy in High-Stakes Information
item.description: Campbell Brown, former Meta news chief, has launched Forum AI, a company focused on evaluating how foundation AI models handle complex, high-stakes topics like geopolitics, mental health, finance, and...

item.title: Aespa release new single with G-DRAGON ahead of second album ‘LEMONADE’
item.description: K-pop sensation Aespa have joined forces with BigBang’s G-DRAGON for their latest single, ‘WDA (Whole Different Animal)’, which offers a dynamic mix of electronic dance, hip-hop, rock, and R&B pop. Th...

item.title: Canadian Government Encourages Businesses to Access Chinese E-Commerce Markets
item.description: The federal government in Ottawa is actively promoting efforts to help Canadian companies sell products on major Chinese e-commerce platforms. This initiative is part of a broader strategy to expand i...

item.title: TSC to confirm 20,000 contract teachers and expand promotions to 30,000
item.description: The Teachers Service Commission (TSC) plans to convert 20,000 teachers on contract under the internship programme to permanent and pensionable terms starting January next year. The remaining 24,000 in...

item.title: Medieval Solar Storm Revealed Through Ancient Japanese Trees and Historical Records
item.description: Researchers at the Okinawa Institute of Science and Technology (OIST) have uncovered evidence of a powerful medieval solar storm that occurred around 1200 CE by analyzing ancient tree rings and histor...

item.title: Nwoko Media Urges Okowa to Step Aside for Senatorial Race in Delta North
item.description: As the 2027 general elections dey approach, Senator Ned Nwoko's media team don publicly ask former Delta State governor, Ifeanyi Okowa, make e withdraw him senatorial ambition for Delta North. Accordi...
